Items.Title: 不要在大型​​数据集上使用过滤方法！ | Don’t use filter method on Large Datasets!
Items.Description:
埃马德·哈桑·汗

发表于 3 月 17 日

我正在处理遇到性能问题的应用程序，这个问题与我在 Angular 应用程序中使用网格以及在网格上触发表的 td 元素上的单击事件有关。

在附加到那个 td 的方法中，我传递了行的索引，在 .ts 文件上，我使用了数组的 .filter 方法，后来我意识到，如果数组大小达到 5000 条记录，那么这将遇到性能瓶颈。

所以我决定使用 for 循环而不是过滤器，它将我的性能提升到我无法想象的水平。 这是供您参考的代码：

一旦暂停，emadkhanqai 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，emadkhanqai 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，emadkhanqai 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 emadkhanqai 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 emadkhanqai：

降低 emadkhanqai 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 emadkhanqai 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Emad Hassan Khan

Posted on Mar 17

I was working on the application in which I faced a performance issue, the issue was related to the fact that I used a grid in Angular application and on the grid I was triggering a click event on the td element of the table.

In the method attached to that td I was passing the index of the row and on the .ts file I used .filter method of array, later I realized that if the array size reaches to 5000 records then this will hit a performance bottleneck.

So I decided to use the for loop instead of filter and it boosted my performance to the level I can’t imagine. Here’s the code for your reference:

Durgesh kumar prajapati - Mar 17

Once suspended, emadkhanqai will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, emadkhanqai will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by emadkhanqai will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If emadkhanqai is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag emadkhanqai:

Make all posts by emadkhanqai less visible

emadkhanqai consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging emadkhanqai will restore default visibility to their posts.
